title: The Victory at Rach Gam - Xoai Mut
summary: In just one night, the Tay Son army under the command of Nguyen Hue defeated 50,000 Siamese invaders in the Western river region.

slides.text: In 1785, the Siamese army from the South invaded our country. They were very aggressive and relied on their large numbers and strong ships.
slides.imagePrompt: Many large war boats with distinct southern style flags entering a wide river, aggressive atmosphere, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: Nguyen Hue chose the Rach Gam - Xoai Mut river section (Tien Giang) as the site for the decisive battle. He secretly ambushed soldiers and cannons on both riverbanks.
slides.imagePrompt: A bird's eye view of a winding river with dense coconut trees on both banks, hidden cannons peeking through the leaves, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: When the enemy entered the trap, cannons from both banks fired simultaneously. The enemy ships went up in flames, unable to react.
slides.imagePrompt: River battle at night, fire on water, cannons firing from the banks, enemy boats sinking, heroic and intense, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: In a short period, 50,000 Siamese soldiers were defeated. From then on, they 'feared the Tay Son army like tigers'!
slides.imagePrompt: Enemies running away on land towards the border, looking back in fear, victorious Tay Son soldiers on the river, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.question: Where did the battle of Rach Gam - Xoai Mut take place?
options: The river region of Tien Giang
slides.answer: The river region of Tien Giang

slides.question: Which general commanded the victory at Rach Gam - Xoai Mut?
